title: PCMC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 407 Apprentice Trainee Posts
description: The Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation (PCMC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 407 Apprentice Trainee Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their ITI can apply for the PCMC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, ...
